archive_sensitivity.conclusion: Natural front has ~211 solutions per run. Archive 100 captures same quality (HV delta < 0.03%). Crowding-distance pruning is effective.

convergence_analysis.conclusion: 99% of final HV reached by iteration 134. Last 200 iterations contribute < 0.5%.

f1_range_analysis.conclusion: f1 is 28x narrower than f2 in relative terms. The greedy decoder structurally constrains f1 variability because visa demand >> supply forces most permutations to similar unserved-load outcomes.
